title: Russian Bean Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Russian-inspired pilaf dish made with beans and sprouts, perfect for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the mung beans and Russian pilaf mix to the skillet.
Cook according to the pilaf mix instructions, stirring frequently.
Add the bean sprouts to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: Add cooked sausage or ham to the pilaf for added protein.
